parameters.columns:
pts.id,
                    pa.platform,
                    pa.platform_user_id,
                    pa.display_name,
                    ft.status as trial_status,
                    ft.id as free_trial_id,
                    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_trial_surveys ps2
                     JOIN free_trials ft2 ON ft2.id = ps2.free_trial_id
                     WHERE ps2.platform_account_id = pts.platform_account_id
                     AND ft2.status = 'pending'
                     AND ps2.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as surveys_24h
parameters.conditions:
ft.status = 'pending'
                    AND pts.free_trial_id IS NOT NULL
                    AND pts.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'

options.join:
INNER JOIN free_trials ft ON ft.id = pts.free_trial_id
INNER JOIN platform_accounts pa ON pa.id = pts.platform_account_id

parameters.message:
🎁 Reminder — Free Trial Still Available!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Hi{{#if $json.display_name}} {{$json.display_name}}{{/if}}! Your free trial access is still ready.

You started a trial request but haven't completed a survey yet.

💡 Complete just 1 survey = 2 hours of free proxy access.

Tap the link to get started → {{ $env.THEOREM_REACH_SURVEY_URL }}

Questions? Just reply to this message.
